command: for day in 12 13 14; do echo '=== April $day ==='; LOG=~/Documents/Projects/AetherBot/Logs/AetherBot_2026-04-$day.txt; echo "Lines: $(wc -l < $LOG)"; echo "Size: $(ls -lh $LOG | awk '{print $5}')"; echo '--- First 5 lines ---'; head -5 $LOG; echo '--- Last 5 lines ---'; tail -5 $LOG; echo '--- Balance mentions ---'; grep -i 'balance\|Balance\|BALANCE' $LOG | tail -5; echo '--- Trade/ticker count ---'; grep -ci 'ticker\|TICKER\|harvest\|HARVEST\|trade\|TRADE\|filled\|FILLED' $LOG || echo 0; echo ''; done 2>&1
